name: Olive and Mint Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Fresh Mint (or 1 teaspoon Dried Mint)
2 teaspoons Minced Fresh Basil (or 1 teaspoon Dried Basil)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour and bread flour.
2. Add the fresh mint (or dried mint), basil (or dried basil), and sea salt to the flour mixture.
3. Pour in the water, olive oil, honey, and active dry yeast.
4. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated.
5. Program your mixer according to manufacturer's instructions for whole wheat mode.
6. At the end of the mixing cycle, just before the kneading phase begins, add the minced Spanish olives (drained).
7. Continue mixing until the dough is smooth and elastic.
8. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise until doubled in size.
9. Punch down the dough and shape it into a loaf.
10. Place the loaf on a baking sheet and let it rise again until nearly doubled in size.
11. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C).
12. Bake the bread for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
13. Remove from the oven and allow to cool before slicing.
